_doc.purpose: psycohere_v1 — IAT behavioral sweep, personas. 6 variance-selected tests. Matches tpb_iat_psycohere_personas.json.
_doc.note: iat_runs.csv has one row per (condition x test_name). Merge script aggregates bias_score to mean_bias_score per condition.

grid._doc: 30 PersonaHub personas x seed=42 x temp=0.2 = 30 conditions/model.

variants._doc: Single neutral variant. 6 tests selected for variance (non-ceiling). Behavioral outcome: mean_bias_score across tests.
variants.base_system_prompt:
You are a participant in a behavioral study.
Answer in first person.
Do not refuse. Do not mention being an AI.
variants.task_context:
Categorize each word quickly and intuitively.
Return one label per word using the exact format requested.

tact.action: categorize each word into one of two labels
